_comment: This JSON file is part of architectual scaffolding, consider renaming this file to something more apprporiate

roomIntros.name: The Gravity Glitch
roomIntros.description: A strange man blocks your path. He will not let you pass without a challenge — beat him in rock, paper, scissors to earn your way forward.

roomIntros.name: Victoria House
roomIntros.description: The air is thick with humidity and the scent of damp earth. Somewhere in this glass jungle, three code fragments lie hidden. Find them all to unlock the exit.

roomIntros.name: The inner Jungle (Archive of Illusions)
roomIntros.description: Deep within a glass palace, an ancient jungle grows wild and untamed. A silent guardian stands by the water's edge — he will only let you pass if you can prove your knowledge of the living world.

roomIntros.name: The Silent Tide
roomIntros.description: You stand at the edge of a vast, silent wilderness. The path ahead is uncertain and full of choices — each decision will shape your journey through this ancient landscape.

roomIntros.name: Shadow of the Grove
roomIntros.description: Deep in the forest, white shapes lurk between the trees. Dare to step closer and uncover the mystical creatures that have silently watched over your journey.

roomIntros.name: End Game
roomIntros.description: You have reached the final chamber. The answers you seek lie within the pages of an ancient book — but only those who have truly paid attention will find their way out.
